message:
feat(dashboard): add activity feed slide-over panel

Adds the UI for viewing activity events:
- activity_panel.html template with filter buttons and event list
- Bell button in fleet header toggles activity panel
- Slide-over panel loads /activity endpoint via htmx
- Server exposes ActivityFeed for recording events

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

{{.Message}}

{{.RepoURL}}

+ {{else}} +
No activity yet
+ {{end}} +
